title: TCSMP Season 1
description: This is the official public release of the TCSMP Season 1 modpack!
body:
# TCSMP Season 1

The TCSMP is a SMP for The Church of [Server], which is a group of people (some of which are content creators) who are participating in a Minecraft SMP together.

This pack is for all people, and we thought we would share the pack on Modrinth as we have put a lot of effort into its development, optimization, and overall feel. Enjoy!

We will be using this pack for our SMP, and I will be recording and editing that for my upcoming YouTube series!

## Running

I recommend allocating 6 to 8 gigabytes (GB) of RAM to this pack. It's pretty hefty, but it should run well on low-end devices.

## Known issues

Sometimes menus will freeze up or be laggy when the pack is under load. I don't currently know of a good way to mitigate this issue.

Duplicate ores are a thing, but I've tried to mitigate this as much as possible using the mod [Almost Unified](https://modrinth.com/mod/almost-unified).

If you find any other bugs or issues, please don't hesitate to create a GitHub issue! I'll try to respond as quickly as I can.

## Credits

Modpack Development Lead - @RedstoneWizard08
Menu Design - @NioBeMe

Playtesters:
- @EntropianVFX
- @FearlessFoster
- @Mattyplays72
- @EctoG20
- @user_25th9p7
- @MonkiiEngineer
- @Bogdanasaurus
